title: Vanilla Changes
description: Vanilla plus modpack that primarily focuses on enhancing and refining the existing Minecraft experience
body:
A modpack that's intent is to make you feel as you're playing vanilla but having many features that you wish were in the base game

![‎ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31d1e889e6cd10f5d2c3fb135998dc8323582249.png)

Keep in mind, this modpack is in early development and has been released with the purpose to receive feedback and suggestions to improve the modpack and squash bad bugs and poor performance also some features I would like to add I must postpone until their release for 1.21
